data.title: Elevate Organic launches first-ever organic Shatavari supplement, SRI-81™ capsules and gummies.
data.description: A new product line has been introduced by Elevate Organic in Jupiter, Florida. The SRI-81™ Shatavari & ROC™ KSM-66® Ashwagandha supplements have been launched, showcasing innovative capsules and gummies supported by scientific research.
Eurogroup's President Donohoe: I am confident French government will find a way.

data.title: Enzo Villani of AlphaTON Capital discusses TON Blockchain and Telegram growth in Nasdaq interview.
data.description: Discussion at a recent fireside chat delved into various topics including the TON Blockchain, growth of the Telegram ecosystem, communication privacy, and the integration of digital assets in the future. The chat highlighted key aspects such as the capabilities of the TON Blockchain, the expanding Telegram ecosystem, the importance of communication privacy, and the potential integration of digital assets. Overall, the chat served as a platform to discuss the growth and potential impact of these technologies, offering insights into their advancement and relevance in the digital landscape.

data.title: Delta Air Lines (DAL) exceeds expectations with Q3 earnings: $16.7B operating revenue, $2.17 GAAP EPS, $1.71 adjusted EPS, 6% rise in revenue.
data.description: Delta Air Lines Inc.'s (NYSE: DAL) stock surged after the release of its Q3 2025 earnings report, surpassing expectations for adjusted EPS and revenue. The company reported operating revenue of $16.7 billion, a 6% increase from the previous year. GAAP EPS stood at $2.17, a 10% rise year-over-year, while adjusted EPS exceeded expectations at $1.71 compared to the estimated $1.52. Share prices rose following the positive results. Passenger revenue also saw growth, increasing by 3% driven by a 9% boost in premium product sales and a 13% rise in loyalty travel awards. Ancillary revenue experienced a significant 59% increase from the same period last year. Adjusted operating income for the quarter reached $1.7 billion with a solid operating margin of 11.2%. Delta's various high-margin revenue streams contributed to its success in the quarter.

data.title: IQSTEL becomes debt-free on Nasdaq, plans $500,000 dividend in shares, eliminates convertible notes, completes acquisitions.
data.description: IQSTEL Inc., a Global Connectivity, AI & Digital Corporation listed on NASDAQ under the ticker IQST, has successfully eliminated all its convertible notes. Additionally, the company has completed full payment for the QXTEL and Globetopper acquisitions. This marks a significant milestone for IQSTEL as it accelerates its partnership with Cycurion. On October 9, 2025, IQSTEL proudly shared this news, highlighting its commitment to growth and financial stability.

data.title: Flagstar Financial, Inc. (NYSE: FLG) receives support from ISS for shareholder vote to enhance corporate structure.
data.description: Flagstar Financial, Inc. revealed today that Institutional Shareholder Services (ISS), an esteemed independent proxy advisory firm, has made a significant announcement. The Company, which operates as the holding company for Flagstar Bank, N.A., received the news on Oct. 9, 2025. This company is identified by the ticker symbol FLG on the New York Stock Exchange (NYSE).

data.title: Erin Siegfried appointed Chief Legal Officer at Northwest Bank in Ohio on Oct. 9, 2025. Key member of the team.
data.description: In Columbus, Ohio, on October 9, 2025, Northwest Bank, a comprehensive financial institution providing a range of business and personal banking services, revealed the selection of Erin Siegfried as their new chief legal counsel and corporate secretary. Siegfried's appointment marks a crucial addition to the team as she takes on these key roles within the organization.

data.title: Autonomix Medical granted U.S. patent on tech enabling precise nerve-targeted therapies in cardiology with 120+ patents.
data.description: Autonomix has established a robust global intellectual property portfolio in the field of nerve-sensing and modulation, with a total of more than 120 patent applications that have been issued or are pending.

data.title: Akari Therapeutics files 2 new patents for immuno-oncology mode using PH1 payload, aiming to activate immune system against cancer.
data.description: Akari Therapeutics, Plc has filed two new provisional patent applications with the USPTO. The first application protects their novel immuno-oncology payload, PH1, and its spliceosome modulatory mechanism of action. The second filing covers a combination therapy of PH1 pipeline ADCs with other immuno-oncology drugs. The goal is to activate the host immune system against cancer. These applications are part of Akari's strategy to expand its proprietary position related to the PH1 payload. This follows a previous patent filing in September for using Akari's ADC platform to target cancer by modulating alternative splicing drivers within cancer cells.

data.title: SaverOne's System named in TIME's Best Inventions of 2025 list for its safety solution blocking unsafe phone use.
data.description: Today, in Petah Tikvah, Israel, SaverOne 2014 Ltd. made an announcement that their groundbreaking SaverOne System has been recognized by TIME in its Best Inventions list for 2025. This technology company, traded as Nasdaq: SVRE and TASE: SVRE, specializes in transportation safety solutions. TIME's prestigious list showcases 300 innovations that are making a significant impact on society. The SaverOne System stands out for its ability to detect and prevent hazardous phone usage while driving, ensuring road safety by proactively eliminating distractions.

data.title: Asendia USA provides alternative for US online retailers amid Canada Post strike, ensuring smooth shipping to Canada during upcoming peak season.
data.description: Philadelphia, October 9, 2025 - Asendia USA is providing a solution for US online retailers facing challenges with shipping to Canada due to the ongoing Canada Post strike. The company's extensive network offers a way to ensure orders continue to be delivered smoothly during the upcoming peak season. This initiative comes at a crucial time as the strike has led to disruptions in postal services, affecting the delivery of packages between the two countries. Asendia USA's alternative shipping option is expected to benefit a significant number of businesses looking to fulfill orders to Canada efficiently.

data.title: Melts™ debuts dissolvable supplement strips at GetMelts.com, founded by Arizona State University student Sam Bregman.
data.description: Entrepreneur Sam Bregman, a student at Arizona State University, has launched a new website, GetMelts.com, for Melts™ - an innovative dissolvable supplement strip company. These strips are unique and have been designed to dissolve easily. Founded by Sam Bregman, Melts™ is proud to introduce its website to the public.

data.title: LEHR emergency vehicle upfitter expands with new 40,000-square-foot facility in Houston, creating jobs and meeting demand in Texas.
data.description: In Houston, a new facility is set to open on October 9, 2025, by LEHR, the top emergency vehicle upfitter in the United States. It will cover 40,000 square feet and is expected to support the increasing demand for emergency vehicles in Texas. This expansion is anticipated to create new employment opportunities in the area due to the growing need for these specialized vehicles.

data.title: Hush Security launches new runtime certificate intelligence feature, detecting and replacing non post-quantum-compliant certificates.
data.description: Hush Security, based in Tel Aviv, Israel, revealed a significant enhancement to its Secretless Access Management Platform on October 9, 2025. The update includes automated runtime detection and substitution for non post-quantum-compliant certificates deemed high-risk. This development aims to bolster security measures implemented by Hush.

data.title: Magnolia Family Dentistry in Austin provides affordable dental care to residents without insurance, targeting seniors, gig workers, freelancers, musicians & artists with membership plans.
data.description: AUSTIN, Texas - On October 9, 2025, accessible services will be offered to a larger demographic, including seniors, gig workers, freelancers, musicians, and artists through membership plans. Recognized as the Live Music Capital of the country, Austin is home to numerous aspiring musicians and artists. This initiative aims to cater to the diverse needs of individuals in different professions and age groups.

data.title: Report exposes legal loopholes allowing child marriage in 34 US states; 314,000 children married between 2000-2021.
data.description: In the period from 2000 to 2021, a total of more than 314,000 minors were reported to have been married in the United States. Shockingly, some of these children were as young as 10 years old, with the majority being young girls. The findings of a recent report titled "Legal Gaps and Enduring Harm: Analyzing the Persistence of Child Marriage in the United States" shed light on this concerning issue, bringing attention to the need for addressing and preventing child marriages in the country.

data.title: Levi Strauss (NYSE: LEVI) releases Q3 earnings on Oct. 9 with expectation of 31 cents/share, $1.50B revenue; offers 2.27% dividend yield.
data.description: Levi Strauss & Co. (NYSE: LEVI) is set to reveal its third-quarter earnings after market close on Thursday, October 9. Analysts are predicting earnings of 31 cents per share, a decline from the previous year's 33 cents per share. The company is expected to report quarterly revenue of $1.50 billion, a decrease from $1.52 billion in the same period last year. The recent appointment of Chris Callieri as senior vice president and chief supply chain officer on August 19 has attracted attention. Investors are eyeing potential dividends, with Levi Strauss currently offering an annual dividend yield of 2.27%, equating to a quarterly-annual dividend amount of 14 cents per share.

data.title: PepsiCo beats Q3 earnings estimate with $2.29 EPS and $23.937B sales (+2.6% YoY), led by growth in NA and international markets.
data.description: PepsiCo, Inc. (NASDAQ: PEP) announced surpassing analyst expectations with third-quarter adjusted earnings of $2.29 per share, higher than the projected $2.26. Quarterly sales totaled $23.937 billion, marking a 2.6% increase compared to the previous year and surpassing the anticipated $23.827 billion. Chairman and CEO Ramon Laguarta attributed the growth to the resilience of the international business, improved momentum in North America Beverages, and the impacts of portfolio reshaping actions. Notable revenue performances include PepsiCo Foods North America (PFNA) reporting flat growth, PepsiCo Beverages North America (PBNA) increasing by 2%, and International Beverages Franchise (IB Franchise) maintaining stability. Latin America Foods (LatAm Foods) saw a 2% sales growth, while Europe, Middle East, and Africa (EMEA) experienced a 9% rise. Asia Pacific sales also increased by 2% during the quarter.
